Based on the AI model's prediction,
The fact that 계좌가 없는 경우 correlates with a reduced probability of default, because it reflects conservative financial behavior, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [1]
The fact that 계좌 잔액이 마이너스인 경우 signals heightened financial vulnerability, because it indicates overdraft status, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [2]
The fact that 저축 계좌 잔액이 100마르크 미만인 경우 lack sufficient financial buffers to absorb repayment shocks, because it limits liquidity, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a high risk of default.
